info.title: Change Action Web Services (Collaborative Industry Innovator)
info.summary: APIs to manage change actions (search, create, retrieve, patch, approve and reject)

post.description: Creates a new Change Action or subtype of Change Action with elements passed in input. Elements passed in input can only be part of the core part

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

400.description: Issue occured during creation of the Change Action. Invalid Json passed in input

401.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

403.description: Function cannot be executed as a check failed, could be linked with an invalid CSRF token or a system condition unfulfilled

get.description: Retrieves a Change Action with the required facets. Core part is always retrieved

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The physicalid of the Change Action you want to retrieve

parameters.name: $fields
parameters.description: The parameter allowing retrieval of the Change Action's additional fields. Comma separated list of fields among members, proposedChanges, realizedChanges, realizedActivities, referentials, contexts, flowDown, governingChanges, customerAttributes, dependencies, stacking

400.description: Issue occured during retrieval of the Change Action. Identifier passed in input is not a Change Action or Invalid Json passed in input

401.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

patch.description: Modify an existing Change Action. Only the elements passed in input are modified. Output will be composed of the core part as well as the modified fields. Addition of Proposed Changes is limited at 150 per call.

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::VPLMProjectLeader.MyCompany.Default

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The physicalid of the Change Action you want to modify

400.description: Identifier passed in input is not a Change Action or invalid Json passed in input

401.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

403.description: Function cannot be executed as a check failed, could be linked with an invalid CSRF token or a system condition unfulfilled

413.description: Addition of Proposed Changes is limited to 150 elements in a single call.

delete.description: Deletes a Change Action from the system

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The physicalid of the Change Action you want to delete

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

400.description: Identifier passed in input is not a Change Action or Invalid Json passed in input

401.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

403.description: Function cannot be executed as a check failed, could be linked with an invalid CSRF token or a system condition unfulfilled

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The physicalid of the Change Action you want to cancel

413.description: Approval of Change Action on a Cloud environment can be done only if the Change Action is impacting 30 items or less

parameters.name: SecurityContext

get.summary: Gets a list of Change Action from indexed search
get.description: Gets a list of Change Actions. By default, returns a total of up to 50 items, can be optionally increased upto 1000 items using $top query parameter.Recommendation, Use $searchStr query parameter with a minimum of two characters for better performances.

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::VPLMProjectLeader.MyCompany.Default

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: A search text to find one or more items.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

200.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

401.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

put.summary: Set an existing Change Action on hold.
put.description: Set a Change Action on hold

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::VPLMProjectLeader.MyCompany.Default

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The physicalid of the Change Action you want to set on hold

200.description: Change Action successfully set on hold.

400.description: Identifier passed in input is not a Change Action or invalid Json passed in input

401.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

403.description: Function cannot be executed as a check failed, could be linked with an invalid CSRF token or a system condition unfulfilled

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The physicalid of the Change Action you want to resume

type.example: Type of Change Action or its Sub type

Person.description: full details of a Person can be retrieved using dedicated Web Service /resources/modeler/pno/person/userX

Group.description: full details of a Group can be retrieved using group URI

items.description: the internal id of the Proposed Change or What to be deleted. When a Proposed Change is deleted all connected What are deleted too
One or more SpecializationExtension can be removed from object

internalid.description: Is mandatorily an existing Proposed Change id. To be specified only if the objective is to add a What to an existing Proposed Change
Is mandatorily an existing Proposed Change id. To be specified only if the objective is to add Resolutions to an existing Proposed Change

duplicationString.description: applicable only in the context of NewBranch

internalid.description: Proposed Change or Proposed Activity id on which status (Proposed Change only) or why has to be changed
Is mandatorily an existing Proposed Change id on which resolutions have to be replaces. Empty to clear resolutions

state.description: current state of the Change Action

owner.example: Identifier of the owner of the Change Action

target.description: Possible values are: CurrentVersion, NewVersion, NewBranch. This list will be extended in the future

what.description: Possible values are: ChangeMaturityRelease, ChangeMaturityObsolete, Modify. This list will be extended in the future
